case_title: LINDSAY DEIS ET AL VS. GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEIS, LINDSAY HOFFMAN, JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC $475.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS LINDSAY DEIS AND JOSHUA HOFFMAN JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2020 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEIS, LINDSAY HOFFMAN, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LINDSAY DEIS IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCES COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA HOFFMAN IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA NAVAS PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,319.17 FILED BY DEIS, LINDSAY HOFFMAN, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2020 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (AND DECLARATION IN SUPPORT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEIS, LINDSAY HOFFMAN, JOSHUA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT GREYSTAR REAL ESTATE PARTNERS LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APEARANCE
